clientAuth.title: Set your password
clientAuth.subtitle: Create a secure password for your UnitLift client account.
clientAuth.successBody: Your account is ready. Open the UnitLift mobile app and sign in with your email and the password you just created.
clientAuth.successHint: Install UnitLift from the App Store or Google Play if you don't have the app yet.
clientAuth.invalidLink: This link is invalid or has expired. Ask your coach for a new invite, or use “Forgot password” on the login screen in the mobile app.
clientAuth.errWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters.
clientAuth.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

login.title: UnitLift
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access UnitLift
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Contact the administrator.
login.tagline: Everything a trainer needs — in one place.
login.welcomeSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access UnitLift.
login.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
login.forgotSentDesc: We've sent a password reset link. If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
login.resetSubtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
login.resetErrorWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters.
login.resetErrorInvalid: Link has expired or is invalid. Please request a new one.

workoutPlans.title: Training plans
workoutPlans.assigned: {count, plural, one {# assigned plan} other {# assigned plans}}
workoutPlans.noPlans: No training plans assigned to this client.
workoutPlans.saveToDb: Save customised plan to training library
workoutPlans.clientNoPlans: Client has no assigned training plans
workoutPlans.assignDialogSubtitle: Select and customize plan for client
workoutPlans.renamePlanDesc: New name applies only to this client. The original plan remains unchanged.
workoutPlans.removePlanConfirm: If the client has logged workouts on this assignment, it will be archived (inactive, kept for history) instead of deleted. Empty assignments are removed permanently.
workoutPlans.replacePlanConfirm: Plan "{name}" is currently active. Do you want to deactivate it and activate the new plan?
workoutPlans.trackLimitReached: You can track up to 10 exercises per client. Remove one to add another.
workoutPlans.trackAddHint: Show max-weight chart for this exercise in Analytics

mealPlans.title: Meal plans
mealPlans.assigned: {count, plural, one {# assigned plan} other {# assigned plans}}
mealPlans.noPlans: No meal plans assigned to this client.
mealPlans.infoBannerBoth: ✓ Client has training and rest day plans set — the app will show the right plan automatically.
mealPlans.infoBannerTip: 💡 You can set separate plans for training day and rest day — the client will see the right plan depending on the day.
mealPlans.trainingDayHint: The app will show this plan on days when the client has a workout logged.
mealPlans.restDayHint: The app will show this plan on days without a workout.
mealPlans.assignDialogSubtitle: Select and customize plan for client
mealPlans.replacePlanConfirm: Plan "{name}" is currently active as {type}. Do you want to deactivate it and activate the new plan?

packages.title: Packages & Payments
packages.replaceExpiredNotice: Current package will be marked as expired.
packages.deleteConfirm: Delete package "{name}"? The associated payment will be permanently deleted.

copy.title: Copy client
copy.inviteEmailHint: The client will receive an email with a link to set their own password.

calculator.title: Calculators
calculator.stepsDesc: Set a daily step goal for the client. Visible in the tracker and overview.
calculator.noData: Enter client data (weight, height, age) for the calculator to work.
calculator.scenarioHint: Click scenario → send to Macros tab

trainingTracking.overviewWeekPlannedHint: Done vs planned training days this week
trainingTracking.overviewNoPlanDays: No plan days scheduled for this week
trainingTracking.overviewVolumeBaseline: First week with data vs previous
trainingTracking.overviewTrendHint: Based on average weekly load: last 4 weeks vs previous 4
trainingTracking.planHistoryIntro: Each row is a period when a plan was assigned. Open to see sessions from that period.
trainingTracking.emptyWeek: No training days or logs for this week.
trainingTracking.weekHint: Green dot = session logged. Rows follow the plan that was active during this week. Extra sessions appear at the bottom.

detailSheet.noPreviousSession: No earlier session of this training day to compare.
detailSheet.exerciseNoSessionBaseline: No baseline — first logged session of this training slot.
detailSheet.exerciseFirstTime: This exercise was not in the last same session — first appearance in this sequence.
detailSheet.exerciseNoWeightData: Not enough logged sets to compare weights.
detailSheet.verdictBetter: Overall session: higher load than last time.
detailSheet.verdictWorse: Overall session: lower load than last time.
detailSheet.verdictSame: Overall session: similar total load to last time.
detailSheet.summaryNoCompare: Total load for this session only — no previous same-day session to compare.
detailSheet.summaryFootnote: Comparison uses the latest earlier session with the same training day name and plan link.

trainingProgress.exerciseLinesSubtitle: Choose up to 10 exercises per client in Training plans — only those appear here.
trainingProgress.graphsNoTrackedHint: Open Training plans for this client and turn on “Chart” next to the exercises you want to see here (max 10).
trainingProgress.graphNoDataYet: No logged sets for this exercise yet.
trainingProgress.prsSubtitle: Best weight achieved per exercise and when it was set
trainingProgress.progressTableSubtitle: Gray rows = little or no change. Use search and column headers to filter and sort.
trainingProgress.tableScrollHint: Showing 7 rows at a time — scroll for more.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your experience
settings.contactDesc: Need help? Reach out to us through any of the channels below.
settings.tutorialDesc: Show the tooltip tour across the dashboard again.
settings.appInstalled: App is already installed on your device.
settings.addToHomeDesc: Add UnitLift to your home screen
settings.iosSafariWarning: Only works in Safari. If you're using Chrome, open this page in Safari.
settings.androidDesc: In Chrome tap ⋮ menu → "Add to home screen"
settings.mobileOnly: Open this page on mobile to install.
settings.pushUnsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
settings.pushUnsupportedHint: Add the app to your home screen for support.
settings.pushDeniedDesc: Enable them in your browser/phone settings.
settings.pushEnabledDesc: You'll receive alerts for messages and check-ins
settings.billingStripeNote: Stripe calculates the difference for the current period.
settings.billingCancelWarningClients: You have {count} active clients. You'll have access until the end of the period.
settings.billingCancelWarningEmpty: You'll have access until the end of the billing period. After that access is blocked.
settings.billingErrorChangePlan: Error changing plan. Please try again.
settings.billingErrorTooManyClients: Can't switch to {plan} — you have {count} clients but the plan allows {limit}.
settings.appVersionLine: UnitLift v2.1 · Tool for professional coaches
settings.dangerWarning: Actions in this section are permanent and irreversible. Data will be deleted in 30 days.
settings.deletionPendingDesc: Request submitted on {date}. All data will be deleted in 30 days.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently deletes all data — yours and all your clients'
settings.deleteStep1Body: Deleting your account permanently removes all data — yours and all {count} clients'. This includes: workouts, meal plans, check-ins, messages and everything else.
settings.deleteStep1Warning: This action is irreversible. Data will be deleted in 30 days.
settings.deleteConfirmHint: Type DELETE to confirm permanent deletion:

profilePage.visibilityHint: The eye icon shows what clients see in the mobile app.
profilePage.nutritionFieldsHint: Selected fields will be available when adding foods.

profilePage.exerciseDefaultsHint: These values are used as initial settings when adding exercises to plans and templates.

billingPage.bannerLockedDesc: Update your payment method or contact support.
billingPage.bannerPastDueDesc: Payment attempt failed. You have {days} day(s) to update.
billingPage.changePlanSubtitle: Stripe calculates proration automatically — you only pay the difference.
billingPage.tooManyClients: You have {count} clients — reduce before switching
billingPage.changeInstant: Change is active immediately · Prorated automatically
billingPage.cancelConfirmClients:
You have {count} active clients. Cancelling will revoke platform access at the end of the billing period, and your clients won't be able to use the mobile app.

Are you sure?
billingPage.cancelConfirmEmpty: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? You'll have access until the end of the billing period.
billingPage.cancelSuccess: Subscription cancelled. Access until end of period.
billingPage.changePlanDowngradeError: Can't switch to {plan} plan because you have {count} clients, but the plan allows {limit}. Reduce client count first.
billingPage.changePlanSuccess: Plan changed to {plan}. New limit: {limit} clients.
billingPage.upgradeConfirm:
Upgrade to {plan} (€{price}/mo).

Stripe will automatically calculate proration and charge the difference for the remaining period. New plan is active immediately.
billingPage.downgradeConfirm:
Switch to {plan} (€{price}/mo).

You'll receive a credit for the unused period. New plan is active immediately.
